description_long: This infant bed is a classic wooden crib with a rich brown finish, featuring vertical slats on all four sides for safety and ventilation. The crib has a rectangular shape with two taller end panels that provide structural support and a sense of enclosure. Inside, a fitted mattress with a blue sheet is visible, offering a comfortable sleeping surface for an infant. The slatted design ensures visibility and airflow while preventing the child from climbing out. The overall construction appears sturdy, with smooth, rounded edges for child safety. There are no visible wheels, casters, or ornate decorative elements, giving the crib a simple, functional appearance.
description: A sturdy brown wooden crib with vertical slats on all sides and a blue mattress inside, designed for infant safety and comfort. The design is simple and functional, with smooth edges and no decorative features.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the crib with vertical slats and the blue mattress inside.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the narrow end panel and the depth of the crib, with slats visible.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the opposite long side with slats and the mattress.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other end panel and the blue mattress, mirroring view 1.
